items.summary: My brain is about to explode just from trying to read what the card does. 10/10.

items.title: [正面] Très beau jeu, c'est sympa de voir un jeu de carte...
items.summary:
Très beau jeu, c'est sympa de voir un jeu de cartes / rpg en version gacha.
J'aime le design et les possibilités tactique par contre aucun sons depuis la sortie du jeu (hormis l'ecran titre).
Svp réparer ça c'est très désagréable de jouer à un jeu sans aucun bruit ni musique....

items.title: [负面] Pretty cunning to present AI generated slop as bei...
items.summary:
Pretty cunning to present AI generated slop as being " inspired by the Cthulhu mythos".

With that out of the way, the game itself is cut down and monetized Slay the Spire clone port form phones, which wasn't even that bad, to be honest, but the feeling of something missing and being off didn't go away. Probably it's due to the limit of 3-4 unique cards per character and "laggy" feeling to the controls due to the always present 500+MS ping on top of the occasional stutters when it tried presenting animations with a lot of moving parts in them.

Maybe if it was available globally on the phone i would have played it there, but on PC it's really not that enjoyable considering there are way more options to choose from.

items.summary: 我个人感觉哦，比那个1999好玩点，人家送得多，本人id：卢泓然卢大王，各位相位对弈遇见我的大佬送送分，拿着录屏来找我有红包，超过1500分炸鱼的，咱们直接b站，抖音发视频曝光
